title: Lectron Unveils New Retail Partnership with AutoZone, America's Leading Auto Parts Retailer
text: Strategic Partnership Expands Lectron's Retail Footprint while Highlighting the Push Toward Mainstream Electric Vehicle Adoption MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., March 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Lectron, the nation's leading electric vehicle charging brand, has entered a retail partnership with auto parts giant, AutoZone (NYSE: AZO), in a bid to make electric vehicle charging more accessible to consumers.

title: AutoZone Stock Drives Higher After Upbeat Results
text: AutoZone Inc (NYSE:AZO) reported fiscal second-quarter profits of $22.30 per share on revenue of $3.37 before the bell this morning, both of which were higher than Wall Street's estimates.

title: AutoZone Inventory up as Company Opens New Stores in Q2

title: AutoZone (AZO) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: AutoZone (AZO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 25.28% and 6.74%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: AutoZone shares jump 2% premarket as earnings top estimates
text: Shares of car parts maker AutoZone Inc. AZO, -0.07% rose 2% in premarket trade Tuesday, after second-quarter earnings blew past estimates. The company posted net income of $471.76 million, or $22.30 a share, for the quarter to Feb. 12, up from $345.95 million, or $14.93 a share in the year-ago quarter.

title: AutoZone 2nd Quarter Same Store Sales Increase 13.8%; EPS Increases to $22.30
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn., March 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AutoZone, Inc. (NYSE: AZO) today reported net sales of $3.4 billion for its second quarter (12 weeks) ended February 12, 2022, an increase of 15.8% from the second quarter of fiscal 2021 (12 weeks). Domestic same store sales, or sales for stores open at least one year, increased 13.8% for the quarter.
